home_page.page_description: iPlayground document request entry for looking up available documents for currently open events.
home_page.hero_lead: Choose an event that is currently open for requests to look up available documents.
home_page.form_subtitle: Choose the event and document type for your request.
home_page.event_list_unavailable_message: Events are temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
home_page.generated_at_help_action_label: Show where to find the generated time
home_page.generated_at_help_image_alt: Guide image showing where the printed date appears on a 407 tax receipt
home_page.certificate_options_subtitle: Confirm the information you want shown on the completion certificate.
home_page.certificate_options_download_subtitle: Confirm the information you want shown on the completion certificate; once confirmed, it cannot be changed.
home_page.certificate_preview_subtitle: Review the certificate layout and display options.
home_page.certificate_change_request_processing_me: Your change request is being processed. An administrator will review it before issuing the certificate. Confirming certificate generation now will be treated as abandoning this change request.
home_page.certificate_change_request_approved_mess: Your change request was approved. Please review the display options below, then preview and generate the certificate.
home_page.certificate_change_request_rejected_mess: Your change request was rejected. Please preview and generate the certificate with the current information.
home_page.certificate_change_request_subtitle: Describe the certificate information that needs to be corrected. An administrator will review it before issuing the certificate.
home_page.certificate_change_request_note_placehol: Example: Use my legal name, or adjust the company name.
home_page.certificate_change_request_note_hint: Only include the correction needed for this certificate. Avoid unrelated personal information.
home_page.certificate_change_request_submitted_mes: Your change request was submitted. An administrator will review it before issuing the certificate.
home_page.certificate_change_request_invalid_messa: The change request is incomplete. Please check it and submit again.
home_page.certificate_change_request_forbidden_mes: Please submit change requests from this website.
home_page.certificate_change_request_unavailable_m: Change requests are temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
home_page.certificate_issue_invalid_message: The certificate issue data is incomplete. Please look it up again and try once more.
home_page.certificate_issue_forbidden_message: Please generate certificates from this website.
home_page.certificate_issue_not_allowed_message: This completion certificate cannot be generated right now.
home_page.certificate_issue_unavailable_message: Certificate generation is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
home_page.certificate_change_request_not_allowed_m: This completion certificate cannot request changes right now.
home_page.tax_receipt_results_subtitle: All 407 tax receipts for this Tax ID in the selected event are listed below.
home_page.tax_receipt_download_cooldown_message: These receipts were just downloaded. Please try again later.
home_page.tax_receipt_download_unavailable_message: Receipt download is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
home_page.lookup_not_found_message: No matching document was found. Please check your information and try again.
home_page.lookup_not_available_yet_message: Completion certificates are not available for download yet. Please try again after the opening time.
home_page.lookup_blocked_message: Too many failed lookups. Lookup is paused for 24 hours.
home_page.lookup_blocked_remaining_hours_message_t: Too many failed lookups. Lookup is paused for {hours} hours.
home_page.lookup_blocked_remaining_minutes_message: Too many failed lookups. Lookup is paused for {minutes} minutes.
home_page.lookup_unavailable_message: Document lookup is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
home_page.copyright_notice: All website content and related materials are owned by Taipei Elite Software Developer Association (77212283). Unauthorized reproduction, redistribution, or commercial use is prohibited.
home_page.preview_feedback_template: Lookup details: Event: {eventName}; document type: {documentType}; email: {email}.

verify_page.page_description: Public iPlayground completion certificate verification page for confirming the certificate linked from a QR code.
verify_page.valid_summary: The QR code matches a completion certificate issued by iPlayground.
verify_page.invalid_summary: No valid completion certificate record was found, or the certificate has not been issued yet.
verify_page.unavailable_summary: The verification service is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
verify_page.privacy_note: This page only shows the minimum information needed for verification. If it does not match the certificate you have, contact an iPlayground administrator: support@iplayground.io
